description: Plugins this template defers to. Install once via ./scripts/install-plugins.sh. See README.md for what each plugin does and when it kicks in.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.purpose: task-level discipline: brainstorming, writing-plans, executing-plans, test-driven-development, dispatching-parallel-agents, verification-before-completion, systematic-debugging

plugins.name: gsd
plugins.purpose: OPTIONAL by default — used only for multi-phase projects. Provides phase lifecycle: gsd-new-project, gsd-new-milestone, gsd-spec-phase, gsd-plan-phase, gsd-execute-phase, gsd-verify-work, gsd-ship. Installed via npx (not a Claude marketplace plugin).

plugins.name: claude-mem
plugins.purpose: memory between sessions: mem-search ('did we solve this before?'), make-plan, do

plugins.name: context-mode
plugins.purpose: context-window protection: ctx_batch_execute / ctx_execute / ctx_search intercept large Bash outputs (see CLAUDE.md §8)

plugins.name: context7
plugins.purpose: fresh library docs (FastAPI, Next.js, Tailwind, etc.) — used when hitting a library bug (CLAUDE.md §6 stop-rule)

plugins.name: reflexion
plugins.purpose: multi-perspective critique after a large feature — catches what verification missed (CLAUDE.md §2 table)

plugins.name: github
plugins.purpose: gh operations from chat: PR, issues, branches

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.purpose: design-system + UI components with intentional aesthetics. Used at the feature design stage for HTML mockups BEFORE coding the backend (CLAUDE.md §3)

plugins.name: vercel
plugins.purpose: Vercel deploy + AI SDK + Next.js + shadcn skills. Front-end deployment + AI app scaffolding. See CLAUDE.md §10

plugins.name: railway
plugins.purpose: Backend + Postgres in one click. Default PaaS for full-stack MVP (CLAUDE.md §10)

plugins.name: supabase
plugins.purpose: Managed Postgres + Auth + Storage. Install if you pick Supabase as the backing store

plugins.name: neon
plugins.purpose: Serverless Postgres with branching. Great for Vercel + Next.js MVP

plugins.name: prisma
plugins.purpose: ORM + Prisma Postgres. Install if you want a typed DB layer

plugins.name: auth0
plugins.purpose: Managed authentication. Install if you don't use Supabase Auth and need OAuth/SSO

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.purpose: 67 styles, 96 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 chart types — when frontend-design is not enough
